build.candidateFilterPolicy: Candidates are the post-score subset where frozen=true and selected grade is MLB_STRONG or MLB_LEAN. This full board shows the pre-filter scoring pass for every MLB game.
build.message: MLB baseline build refused after audit. Official MLB builds now require at least one MLB_LEAN/MLB_STRONG, no more than one FRAGILE leg, minimum score 52, and more than BOOK_AGREEMENT alone.

pullCoverage.policy: MLB HOT pull history should start at 1:00 AM ET and continue every 15 minutes.

build.requires: 2 MLB_STRONG + 1 MLB_LEAN_OR_STRONG; zero true COIN_FLIP by default

results.message: Refused because the 3-leg build must be created no later than 2 hours before the first game or match.

pullDiagnostics.policy: Every requested sport with active same-day games or matches must have convertible markets for timestamped storage. Diagnostic probes do not create snapshots.
